hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in src/views/*.vue) WARNINGS=$(grep -n '<button\|<select\|<input type="checkbox"\|<input type="text"' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "Raw HTML in $f:$line — use shared component (Button, Dropdown, Checkbox, FormInput)"; done); if [ -n "$WARNINGS" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"%s"}}' "$(echo "$WARNINGS" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/\\"/g')"; fi ;; esac; }
